description: Analytics & Performance Features - Performance metrics display, equity curve chart, and P&L history chart

userStories.title: Update PerformanceMetrics with real data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my trading performance metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PerformanceMetrics to fetch from GET /performance/metrics
Add date range selector (today, week, month, all)
Verify in browser that metrics display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented performance metrics API, types, hook, and updated component with real data, date range selector, loading skeleton, error state with retry, benchmark comparison, and auto-refresh every 30 seconds.

userStories.title: Update EquityCurve chart with real data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my equity growth over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EquityCurve to fetch from GET /portfolio/equity-history
Display line chart with date on X-axis
Show tooltips with date, equity, P&L on hover
Verify in browser that chart displays correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented equity history API, types, hook, and updated EquityCurve component with real data from GET /portfolio/equity-history. Features include: line chart with date on X-axis and equity on Y-axis, tooltips with date/equity/P&L, starting equity reference line, peak equity markers, summary stats, date range selector, auto-refresh every 30s, loading skeleton, error state with retry, and empty state handling.

userStories.title: Update P&L history chart with real data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my profit and loss over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PnLHistory to fetch from GET /portfolio/pnl-history
Display bar chart with date on X-axis
Show tooltips with date, P&L, trades count on hover
Verify in browser that chart displays correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented P&L history API (already existed in portfolio.ts), types (already existed in portfolio.ts), created usePnlHistory hook, and updated PnLChart component with real data from GET /portfolio/pnl-history. Features include: bar chart with date on X-axis and P&L on Y-axis, color-coded bars (green=profit, red=loss), tooltips with date/P&L/trades count, cumulative P&L line overlay, breakeven reference line, date range selector, symbol filter, auto-refresh every 30s, loading skeleton, error state with retry, summary stats, and empty state handling. Maintained backward compatibility with legacy PnLChart component.
